description_cn: 对实体（网格或多重曲面）上的点添加刚体属性后，使实体在受力后不发生变形。（前面的刚体设置处理的点是以直线为分组依据，这个是以单个实体进行分组），实际上这个东西的是一个方便选取的东西，当输入的点动了，物体也会跟着动，就是始终保持物体与点的相对位置不变，plane输入物体的位置特性（因为是个物体，所以必须用plane表达），一般让点和plane端输入相同的点。
description_en: Adding rigid body properties to points on a solid (mesh or multisurface) prevents the solid from deforming under stress. (Previous rigid body settings grouped points based on lines, while this grouping is done on a per-solid basis.) This is essentially a convenient selection tool; when the input points move, the object moves accordingly, maintaining the relative position of the object and points. The `plane` parameter inputs the object's positional characteristics (since it's an object, it must be represented by a `plane`). Generally, the points and the `plane` parameter should be the same.

parameters.name: Part
parameters.desc_cn: 按网格或多重曲面分组
parameters.desc_en: Part as a Mesh or Brep

parameters.name: Plane
parameters.desc_cn: 刚体的初始平面，如果未提供，将使用质心所在的XY对齐平面
parameters.desc_en: The initial frame of the body. If none supplied, an XY aligned plane at the centroid will be used

parameters.name: Points
parameters.desc_en: Optional points to attach to the rigid body

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

outputs.name: P
outputs.desc_en: The planes of the rigid bodies

author: Kangaroo Team
